claim: Since most people learned AI through chatbots, this comes naturally, and they don't even know that there is a better way.
actionable: Since most people learned AI through chatbots, this comes naturally, and they don't even know that there is a better way.

claim: They understand that context rot exists and that intentional context engineering is the best way to work.
actionable: They understand that context rot exists and that intentional context engineering is the best way to work.

claim: After thousands of hours of trial and error, they have internalized the fact that conversations with LLMs don't have to be linear.
actionable: After thousands of hours of trial and error, they have internalized the fact that conversations with LLMs don't have to be linear.

claim: They frequently use {slash} rewind to jump back in time with a model, not just to try again, but to keep context lean.
actionable: They frequently use {slash} rewind to jump back in time with a model, not just to try again, but to keep context lean.

claim: This trunk is analogous to your important and reusable information.
actionable: This trunk is analogous to your important and reusable information.

claim: Once you become a trajectory engineer, you can intentionally create branches, explore, and then trim the branches back.
actionable: Once you become a trajectory engineer, you can intentionally create branches, explore, and then trim the branches back.

claim: You can gather more context on the main branch, use that as recon, and then trim back with {slash} rewind.
actionable: You can gather more context on the main branch, use that as recon, and then trim back with {slash} rewind.

claim: This allows you to explore perturbations of different magnitudes to the input space, letting you explore what the model has to say and refine your prompt's details in order to reach or approach the optimal trajectory, the optimal output that a model could have in your situation.
actionable: This allows you to explore perturbations of different magnitudes to the input space, letting you explore what the model has to say and refine your pro

claim: I personally use {slash} rewind multiple times per session.
actionable: I personally use {slash} rewind multiple times per session.

claim: Whether it be to try an approach with a different prompt or just trim session context down.
actionable: Whether it be to try an approach with a different prompt or just trim session context down.
